name: XFPM (XyPriss Package Manager)
description: The ultra-fast package manager for the XyPriss ecosystem.

message: Orchestration Cleanup & Engine Hardening: Implemented a robust global cleanup pass to ensure generated projects are free of orphan xfpm markers. Harmonized XEMS storage feature markers for consistent orchestration.
